unsafe_indicator: Person moving or present outside the green-marked Designated Safe Walkway boundaries
safe_indicator: Movement along the production floor that remains within the boundaries of the green-marked Designated Safe Walkway

unsafe_indicator: Person interacting with production equipment while wearing a red-black vest or any vest other than the designated green authorization vest
safe_indicator: Person performing an interaction with production equipment while wearing the designated green safety vest and required safety equipment

unsafe_indicator: Electrical panel cover connected to a production machine observed in the open-cover state during production operations
safe_indicator: Cover of an electrical panel connected to a production machine is fully closed

unsafe_indicator: Operating a forklift while carrying three (3) or more standardized blocks in a single load
safe_indicator: Operating a forklift while carrying two (2) or fewer standardized blocks in a single load
